subject: Connecting: Yashvi Parikh
body:
Hi Yashvi Parikh,

I was looking at your recent work and wanted to connect. Would love to hear about what you're focusing on lately.

Best,

subject: Re: Connecting: Yashvi Parikh
body:
Hi Yashvi Parikh,

Thanks for getting back to me! I appreciate your message. I'd love to show you how AMKLDEMEW can help with Lead Generation.

When would be a good time to catch up briefly?
incoming_reply:
Sure, what time?



*Yashvi Parikh*

On Sat, 7 Mar 2026, 12:07 am , <ravaniviraj@gmail.com> wrote:

> Hi Yashvi Parikh,
>
> I saw your reply! Thanks for getting back to me.
>

> Best,
